raw_reaction: 正しい方向ではあるが、境界jet伝播解やAppell降下列解とほぼ同じ構造をTaylor係数として言い換えている。生涯忘れない別解とまでは言えない。
reason: The candidate correctly treats the original stopping-time expectation through boundary derivatives, but it substantially overlaps the existing boundary-jet/Appell lowering viewpoints and is not distinct enough for the exact target line.
